!! !! RE9 SPOILERS AHEAD !! !!

тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО

uhhhh... yeahhh Leon is totally married to all of us btw that's why he's got a ring. us AND Chris!!! yuppp trust me. nah on a serious note capcom just wants to see the world burn LMAOOO He is NOT married imo. I feel like that wouldn't make sense like at all for him to appear outta nowhere engaged. I saw people saying it's either a family/bond ring since Sherry also has one on her pinky (Which would point at Claire also having one?) or an health tracker for the infection. would also make sense since Sherry has Leon's health data? (i believe). Either way I don't think capcom would do that, just like killing Leon off, they 100% knew making his death ending the ONLY ending would make most people just give up on the game, so they made 2 (and the happy one is the canon). I feel like making Leon officially in a relationship/married would also make A LOT of people not gaf about resident evil anymore. (which is kinda sad but understandable), he's the sex symbol, most of the fandom (TODAY) joined thanks to him. these people were already ready to stop playing if he ended dead in requiem... I think it's just a marketing stunt. it makes people talk about the game. more talk, more ┬е┬е┬е.

Then again if he's married, I'm happy for him, as long as it isn't with the woman we shall not pronounce thy name. get him a random citizen im happy lol. he deserves to be truly loved and cared for. I don't think they ever will make that happen anyway. thank you for listening to my weekly tedtalk, blooming flowers!

Also, i know i said i hoped for older characters to appear but I'm GLAD they didn't include them. Grace and Leon are perfect on their own, adding another character would've been too much imo. (Not counting Sherry since shes barely here). I'm also glad Leon has grown enough to deal with shit on his own.
